attributes.action: Make Parent and Child Parking Spaces Permit-Only and Enforceable by Law
attributes.additional_details: In the UK, when an expectant mother receives her dating scan, they receive a Mat b1 entitlement form to receive certain extended healthcare benefits. Along with this form, I’d wish for the expectant mother to receive a ‘Parking Permit’ - which allows the parent to park in a parent and child parking bay for 7 years. If anyone else was to park in the designated spots without a display badge, they would receive a parking fine if it was noted by a parking warden.
attributes.background: I would like the government to make it a legal requirement for only people with children to be able to park in parent and child spaces and for it to be enforceable.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Family parking space badges for children up to 5 & fines for illegitimate use" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/758169
